nodes.label: ∅ | live | man
nodes.sentence: Once upon a time, in the shadowy lands of the dense Bavarian forests, there lived a man named Starkes Verlangen—that is, Strong Desire—who had a wife and a young son.

nodes.label: verlangen | move | family
nodes.sentence: As winter's grip eased, Starkes Verlangen moved his family from their village nestled among timbered hills to the edge of a vast woodland where game was plentiful, a full day's journey from their village.

nodes.label: wife | busy | herself
nodes.sentence: Beneath the towering spruces, the wife busied herself setting up their humble hut, while the father ventured out to hunt.

nodes.label: verlangen | return | ∅
nodes.sentence: One evening, as the sun was sinking behind the hills, Starkes Verlangen returned weary but triumphant, bearing a large deer.

nodes.label: he | call | son
nodes.sentence: Thirsty and spent, he called his son to fetch water from a nearby brook.

nodes.label: boy | shake | head
nodes.sentence: But the boy, though named Strong Desire, shook his head, saying the darkness frightened him.

nodes.label: father | urge | ∅
nodes.sentence: His father urged, reminding him that his mother and he were tired and the brook was but a short way off.

nodes.label: boy | budge | ∅
nodes.sentence: Still, the boy would not budge.

nodes.label: father | say | ∅
nodes.sentence: “Ah, my son,” the father said, sadly, “if you fear to fetch water in the dark, you will never defeat the Red Sorcerer.”

nodes.label: word | strike | heart
nodes.sentence: These words struck deep into the boy’s heart like the jagged edge of a sword.

nodes.label: he | sit | night
nodes.sentence: He sat through the night by their hut’s wooden door, gazing upon the starry sky, sighing as one burdened with great sorrow.

nodes.label: desire | ask | mother
nodes.sentence: At dawn, Strong Desire asked his mother to fashion moccasins from the deer’s hide while he prepared his bow and arrows with solemn purpose.

nodes.label: he | leave | cabin
nodes.sentence: Without a word to his parents, he left the cabin as the mist curled low over the forest floor.

nodes.label: he | shoot | arrow
nodes.sentence: With resolve, he shot an arrow into the pale morning sky, letting it fall westward.

nodes.label: he | find | path
nodes.sentence: Following its path, he found it piercing a stag’s heart.

nodes.label: he | feast | venison
nodes.sentence: He feasted on venison, and the next day repeated the ritual.

nodes.label: arrow | fly | ∅
nodes.sentence: Four arrows flew, and each night, four deer lay dead by his hand.

nodes.label: he | leave | arrow
nodes.sentence: In his haste and distress, he left the arrows lodged in the prey, and when the fifth dawn came, he was arrowless and hungry.

nodes.label: he | collapse | earth
nodes.sentence: Despairing, he collapsed on the cold earth, ready to give up.

nodes.label: sound | stir | forest
nodes.sentence: But then a low, rumbling sound stirred the forest beneath him, like the distant tremble of the earth.

nodes.label: he | see | figure
nodes.sentence: Rising, he saw in the distance a figure—small and bent—walking with a wooden staff along a smooth path that led from a gloomy cabin to a dark, brackish lake whose black waters seemed bottomless.

nodes.label: desire | creep | ∅
nodes.sentence: Surprised, Strong Desire crept closer and hid among the pines.

nodes.label: figure | be | none
nodes.sentence: The figure was none other than the dreaded Kriegsmagd—the War Witch—an ancient crone shrouded in mystery and fear.

nodes.label: staff | adorn | string
nodes.sentence: Her staff was adorned with a string of raven feathers and painted owl talons, which fluttered with every tap she made on the earth, sending forth eerie birdcalls.

nodes.label: crone | enter | cabin
nodes.sentence: The crone entered her cabin and cast off her mantle, woven entirely of women’s hair and detached locks, which when shaken, emitted cackles of laughter that chilled the soul.

nodes.label: boy | speak | word
nodes.sentence: Though frightened, the boy spoke no word.

nodes.label: witch | fix | eye
nodes.sentence: Then the witch fixed her sharp eyes upon him and said, “I have watched you from the moment you left your father’s lodge.

nodes.label: ∅ | fear | ∅
nodes.sentence: Fear not, for I shall be your protector and guide.”

nodes.label: she | invite | he
nodes.sentence: She invited him within, offering supper and asking why he traveled so far.

nodes.label: desire | tell | she
nodes.sentence: Strong Desire told her of his shame and the hardships he faced after refusing to fetch water at night.

nodes.label: witch | nod | ∅
nodes.sentence: The witch nodded slowly.

nodes.label: he | admit | ∅
nodes.sentence:
“Tell me truly," she said, "were you afraid to go to the brook in the dark?”

“I was,” he admitted.

nodes.label: feather | shriek | gesture
nodes.sentence: With a gesture of her staff, the raven feathers shrieked and the mantle quaked, the hair emitting a dreadful, mocking laughter.

nodes.label: you | be | ∅
nodes.sentence: “And are you afraid now?”

nodes.label: she | ask | ∅
nodes.sentence: she asked again.

nodes.label: he | answer | ∅
nodes.sentence: “I am,” he answered boldly.

nodes.label: you | speak | truth
nodes.sentence: “But you speak truth without hesitation.

nodes.label: kriegsmagd | smile | ∅
nodes.sentence: Courage lives in you yet,” the Kriegsmagd smiled.

nodes.label: she | take | comb
nodes.sentence: She took a heavy lead comb and drew it through his short hair again and again until it flowed like that of a maiden of the village.

nodes.label: she | clothe | he
nodes.sentence: Then she clothed him in a woman’s gown embroidered with forest flowers and painted his cheeks a rosy red.

nodes.label: she | give | bowl
nodes.sentence: She gave him a shining silver bowl and told him to carry a blade of scented sedge at his waist.

nodes.label: ∅ | go | edge
nodes.sentence: “Tomorrow,” she said, “go to the edge of that lake.

nodes.label: sorcerer | rule | isle
nodes.sentence: The Red Sorcerer rules there from his isle.

nodes.label: man | beg | you
nodes.sentence: Many men of the village will beg you to become their wife and take you to their homes.

nodes.label: ∅ | refuse | they
nodes.sentence: Refuse them all, and say you seek only the hand of the Red Sorcerer.

nodes.label: ∅ | journey | he
nodes.sentence: When he comes for you, journey with him, but at night, lead him from the village to a lonely path, and then with the blade of sedge, strike his head from his shoulders.”

nodes.label: memory | steel | will
nodes.sentence: Though fear gnawed at his heart, the memory of his father’s disappointment steeled his will.

nodes.label: he | leave | cabin
nodes.sentence: At dawn, he left the War Witch’s cabin, now swallowed in a dense, pale fog thick as wool, which soon vanished when he turned to look back.

nodes.label: he | follow | path
nodes.sentence: He followed the worn path to the lake’s shore opposite the Red Sorcerer’s island.

nodes.label: morning | be | ∅
nodes.sentence: The morning was bright and clear, the sunlight shimmering on the water like polished glass.

nodes.label: he | dip | bowl
nodes.sentence: He dipped the silver bowl into the lake, drawing it out glittering, and soon a flotilla of wooden canoes, carved with serpent heads and painted with runes, swept from the island.

nodes.label: islander | admire | beauty
nodes.sentence: The islanders admired his delicate dress and fair beauty, pleading for marriage with earnest voices.

nodes.label: desire | refuse | ∅
nodes.sentence: Strong Desire refused each boldly.

nodes.label: head | raise | guard
nodes.sentence: When word reached the Red Sorcerer, he launched his grand boat, its ribs formed by living asp serpents with emerald eyes, their heads raised in grim guard.

nodes.label: desire | step | ∅
nodes.sentence: As Strong Desire stepped aboard, the snakes hissed and rattled fiercely, filling the air with dread, but the sorcerer calmed them with whispered spells.

nodes.label: marriage | be | ∅
nodes.sentence: The marriage was swift, held beneath the twisted branches of ancient yews.

nodes.label: desire | give | gift
nodes.sentence: Strong Desire gave rich gifts from the War Witch's hoard.

nodes.label: she | be | ∅
nodes.sentence: Suspicion clouded her face—it was no woman but a man, she was sure.

nodes.label: she | warn | son
nodes.sentence: She warned her son, but he scolded her, breaking his pipe and calling her an old owl.

nodes.label: desire | rise | ∅
nodes.sentence: Shaken and offended, Strong Desire rose, declaring he could not remain after such insult, and left the lodge with the sorcerer trailing behind.

nodes.label: they | walk | beach
nodes.sentence: They walked to the island’s beach where the waves whispered secrets to the shore.

nodes.label: sorcerer | beg | he
nodes.sentence: Red Sorcerer begged him to stay, promising wealth and power, but Strong Desire was unmoved.

nodes.label: sorcerer | rest | head
nodes.sentence: Finally seated, the sorcerer rested his head in the lap of his strange bride, exhausted.

nodes.label: sorcerer | reply | ∅
nodes.sentence:
“Red Sorcerer,” the youth whispered softly, “you have slain many men.”

“Hundreds,” the sorcerer replied, a cruel grin creeping across his face.

nodes.label: i | bring | ruin
nodes.sentence: “Now, with this marriage, I will bring ruin to thousands more.”

nodes.label: desire | coax | smile
nodes.sentence: “And you would kill even me if I were not your wife,” coaxed Strong Desire, with a sweet smile.

nodes.label: sorcerer | say | ∅
nodes.sentence: “Indeed,” said Red Sorcerer.

nodes.label: ∅ | sleep | ∅
nodes.sentence: “Sleep now, and dream of slaughter.”

nodes.label: sorcerer | be | ∅
nodes.sentence: Soon the sorcerer was fast asleep.

nodes.label: desire | draw | blade
nodes.sentence: Seizing the moment, Strong Desire drew the blade of sedge in a swift, clean stroke, severing the wicked head from the shoulders.

nodes.label: he | grasp | head
nodes.sentence: Casting off the gown that had concealed his true self, he grasped the bleeding head and plunged into the cold waters, swimming swiftly to the mainland.

nodes.label: he | hear | cry
nodes.sentence: Behind him, he heard the anguished cries of those who sought the newlyweds, finding only the lifeless, headless body.

nodes.label: witch | welcome | he
nodes.sentence: The War Witch welcomed him back with laughter, praising his bravery and shrewdness.

nodes.label: she | say | ∅
nodes.sentence: “You need not have taken the scalp,” she said, cutting a lock of hair for herself.

nodes.label: ∅ | go | this
nodes.sentence: “Now go home with this—proof that will earn your respect.”

nodes.label: she | warn | he
nodes.sentence: She warned him that on the way he would face one last peril.

nodes.label: maunkahkeesh | demand | sacrifice
nodes.sentence: The Earth Spirit Maunkahkeesh demands a sacrifice of all great heroes.

nodes.label: he | cast | partridge
nodes.sentence: When an earthquake splits the earth beneath, he must cast a partridge into the chasm and leap over it swiftly.

nodes.label: desire | follow | instruction
nodes.sentence: Grateful, Strong Desire followed these instructions and reached his village in safety.

nodes.label: parent | mourn | ∅
nodes.sentence: His parents mourned, believing him lost, and many false sons appeared trying to claim his place.

nodes.label: tear | fill | eye
nodes.sentence: But when their true son stood before them, changed from a timid boy into a man of courage and deeds, tears filled their eyes.

nodes.label: villager | laugh | ∅
nodes.sentence: Yet the young villagers laughed, mocking the once-fearful son.

nodes.label: desire | reveal | trophy
nodes.sentence: Then, with solemn pride, Strong Desire revealed the ghastly trophy—the severed head of the Red Sorcerer, eyes still fixed in a fiendish leer.

nodes.label: laughter | cease | ∅
nodes.sentence: The laughter ceased.

nodes.label: respect | replace | scorn
nodes.sentence: Respect and awe replaced their scorn.

nodes.label: desire | hail | hero
nodes.sentence: From that day, Strong Desire was hailed a hero, lifted among the bravest warriors of his people, and finally became a revered chieftain.

nodes.label: family | earn | honor
nodes.sentence: His family, too, earned honor and esteem for generations to come.
